comments.comment: The mine's construction phase started in 2023, as a result, 2023 releases and disposals have increased in comparison to 2022, when the mine was still in pre-construction.

Previously, concentrations in waste incinerator ash disposed were assumed to negligible due to limited data available. Ash testing data was not available for 2023 either, but it is now assumed that the ash's composition is similar to literature data available for similar incinerators.
